$comment: PREFER FIXING THE IMPORT GRAPH. Only add an entry here when restructuring
is genuinely impractical (e.g. a third-party re-export wrapper the splitter
Every entry MUST include a non-empty `reason`. The guard prints reasons on
match and warns about stale entries so reviewers can audit usage in PRs.
Three exact-match axes (no globs, no prefix matches):
specifiers[]: { spec, from, reason }   -- silence (importer, specifier) pair
files[]:      { path, reason }          -- stop walker descending into a leaf
named[]:      { name, from, reason }    -- silence forbidden named import in one file
Re-review allowlist entries during dependency upgrades; remove stale ones.
